title: geranium wilfordii var. chinense
intro: Geranium wilfordii var. chinense, also known as the Chinese Geranium or Yinyanghuo, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Geranium wilfordii var. chinense include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
